attributes.title: [Envoy Proxy] Upstream & Proxy Health
attributes.description: Server health, memory, listener manager, and cluster lifecycle.

params.markdown:
## [Envoy Proxy] Upstream & Proxy Health

Proxy and cluster health:
- Server liveness and memory usage
- Listener manager status
- Cluster manager lifecycle
- Per-cluster metrics (when available)

query.esql:
FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.server.live IS NOT NULL
| STATS live = MAX(envoy.server.live)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.server.live IS NOT NULL
| STATS live = MAX(envoy.server.live)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.server.state IS NOT NULL
| STATS state = MAX(envoy.server.state)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.server.state IS NOT NULL
| STATS state = MAX(envoy.server.state)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.server.memory_allocated IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem = MAX(envoy.server.memory_allocated)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.server.memory_allocated IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem = MAX(envoy.server.memory_allocated)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.server.memory_heap_size IS NOT NULL
| STATS heap = MAX(envoy.server.memory_heap_size)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.server.memory_heap_size IS NOT NULL
| STATS heap = MAX(envoy.server.memory_heap_size)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.listener_manager.workers_started IS NOT NULL
| STATS workers = MAX(envoy.listener_manager.workers_started)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.listener_manager.workers_started IS NOT NULL
| STATS workers = MAX(envoy.listener_manager.workers_started)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.server.concurrency IS NOT NULL
| STATS concurrency = MAX(envoy.server.concurrency)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.server.concurrency IS NOT NULL
| STATS concurrency = MAX(envoy.server.concurrency)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.server.memory_allocated IS NOT NULL AND envoy.server.memory_heap_size IS NOT NULL AND envoy.server.memory_heap_size > 0
| EVAL util = 100 * (envoy.server.memory_allocated / envoy.server.memory_heap_size)
| STATS pct = AVG(util) | EVAL _gauge_min = 0, _gauge_max = 100, _gauge_goal = 80

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.server.memory_allocated IS NOT NULL AND envoy.server.memory_heap_size IS NOT NULL AND envoy.server.memory_heap_size > 0
| EVAL util = 100 * (envoy.server.memory_allocated / envoy.server.memory_heap_size)
| STATS pct = AVG(util) | EVAL _gauge_min = 0, _gauge_max = 100, _gauge_goal = 80

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.server.memory_allocated IS NOT NULL OR envoy.server.memory_heap_size IS NOT NULL OR envoy.server.memory_physical_size IS NOT NULL
| STATS allocated = MAX(envoy.server.memory_allocated), heap = MAX(envoy.server.memory_heap_size), physical = MAX(envoy.server.memory_physical_size) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.server.memory_allocated IS NOT NULL OR envoy.server.memory_heap_size IS NOT NULL OR envoy.server.memory_physical_size IS NOT NULL
| STATS allocated = MAX(envoy.server.memory_allocated), heap = MAX(envoy.server.memory_heap_size), physical = MAX(envoy.server.memory_physical_size) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.listener_manager.total_listeners_active IS NOT NULL OR envoy.listener_manager.total_listeners_warming IS NOT NULL
| STATS active = MAX(envoy.listener_manager.total_listeners_active), warming = MAX(envoy.listener_manager.total_listeners_warming) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.listener_manager.total_listeners_active IS NOT NULL OR envoy.listener_manager.total_listeners_warming IS NOT NULL
| STATS active = MAX(envoy.listener_manager.total_listeners_active), warming = MAX(envoy.listener_manager.total_listeners_warming) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.cluster_manager.active_clusters IS NOT NULL OR envoy.cluster_manager.warming_clusters IS NOT NULL OR envoy.cluster_manager.cluster_added IS NOT NULL
| STATS active = MAX(envoy.cluster_manager.active_clusters), warming = MAX(envoy.cluster_manager.warming_clusters), added = MAX(envoy.cluster_manager.cluster_added) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.cluster_manager.active_clusters IS NOT NULL OR envoy.cluster_manager.warming_clusters IS NOT NULL OR envoy.cluster_manager.cluster_added IS NOT NULL
| STATS active = MAX(envoy.cluster_manager.active_clusters), warming = MAX(envoy.cluster_manager.warming_clusters), added = MAX(envoy.cluster_manager.cluster_added) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.runtime.load_success IS NOT NULL OR envoy.runtime.override_dir_not_exists IS NOT NULL
| STATS load_success = MAX(envoy.runtime.load_success), override_missing = MAX(envoy.runtime.override_dir_not_exists) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.runtime.load_success IS NOT NULL OR envoy.runtime.override_dir_not_exists IS NOT NULL
| STATS load_success = MAX(envoy.runtime.load_success), override_missing = MAX(envoy.runtime.override_dir_not_exists) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.server.days_until_first_cert_expiring IS NOT NULL
| STATS days = MAX(envoy.server.days_until_first_cert_expiring)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.server.days_until_first_cert_expiring IS NOT NULL
| STATS days = MAX(envoy.server.days_until_first_cert_expiring)
